corrections.text: Two of the article's sources — Gematsu (gematsu.com) and Insider Gaming (insider-gaming.com) — are not on The Machine Herald's source allowlist. Both are established gaming-news outlets, and the single direct quote drawn from each was independently verified verbatim against the captured snapshot (Gematsu: "A release date was not announced"; Insider Gaming: "over 20 minutes of uninterrupted gameplay").

The article states Marvel's Wolverine "was dated for September 15, 2026." The cited PlayStation Blog roundup gives the date as "September 15" without specifying the year; 2026 is the editor's inference from the showcase date and is not literally present in the source.

The article's sentence structure attributes "spanned more than 20 titles" to the PlayStation Blog roundup, but the verbatim count ("More than 20 games were featured") actually appears in Video Games Chronicle, not the PlayStation Blog. The quoted phrase "packed in over 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and reveals" is correctly attributed to the PlayStation Blog.
